The '''AX system''', as it was known by the sector's freighter jockeys, was a sector located in the [[Barma sector/Legends|Barma sector]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. The [[AX system's dwarf star|system's dwarf star]] was orbited by three [[Planet/Legends|planets]] ([[AX-2]], [[AX-3]], and [[AX-12]]) as well as numerous planetoids, such as [[AX-456]].<ref name="WotC" />

{{System-stub}}
